reviews.review_description: The idea is awesome, the execution could use some work. One of which is a tutorial on how to use it. Second would be some type of help screen or button. Third would be a filter to specify what data you want to see or not see. I hope for improvements, and will change my rating, when the time comes... for now... 3 stars.

Fast download. Fast install. GEOdata trackable. Earth comes. Google Earth data. Starlink satellites available. Airplane data trackable.

Controlunit not comfortable. Handtracking ok. Manual for use must be created.

Game can be better than anything that has gone before. 

Good job. I wait for a manual.
It is a good app to explore your environment via maps, and is helpful with inspiring ideas on how you would practically use such a set of data overlays.
